_comment: Generation quality regression baseline. Captured 2026-06-16 after DPP trigram fallback + positive learning + fertile-cell boosting. Any future technique change must not regress these numbers unless the improvement is intentional and the new values are re-baselined.

dpp_diversity.description: DPP selection on 10 candidates (5 AI-cluster near-dupes + 5 diverse). Measures how many AI-cluster candidates survive selection and average pairwise trigram similarity of the selected set. Lower = better diversity.

pass_traits.description: get_pass_traits() output format invariants. Must contain these fields when PASSes exist. Empty store → empty string.

grid_priorities.description: calculate_grid_priorities() must boost fertile forms (top by count gets 3x, second gets 2x) in addition to zero-count forms.

exemplars.description: get_exemplars() must not crash when dossier JSON is missing or incomplete.

thin_candidate_skip.description: Candidates with title+one_liner < 50 chars are not sent to the refinement LLM.
